hero.title: Software Developer focused on product and systems
hero.description: I design and build maintainable web applications with a strong focus on clean architecture, performance, and code quality. I work across backend and frontend to deliver reliable user-facing products.

intro.title: What I bring
intro.text: I combine software engineering and systems fundamentals to create robust, scalable, and easy-to-operate solutions. My goal is to ship useful products that remain technically sustainable over time.

About.title: About me

summary.p1: I am a software developer with a full-stack focus and a clear orientation toward technical quality. I build useful and maintainable solutions aligned with real product goals.
summary.p2: I enjoy working in teams that value accountability, continuous improvement, and clear communication. My goal is to create value from initial analysis through final delivery.

About.workStyleText: I prioritize clarity, ownership, and measurable outcomes. I like to keep codebases organized and documented so they can evolve smoothly as requirements grow.

interests.title: Software architecture
interests.description: Designing maintainable, modular, and scalable applications.

interests.title: Backend and APIs
interests.description: Building clear and well-documented services with a focus on performance and security.

interests.title: Product-driven frontend
interests.description: Clean and functional interfaces focused on usability and visual communication.

interests.title: Automation
interests.description: Using scripts and tooling to reduce manual work and improve technical efficiency.

interests.title: Continuous learning
interests.description: Keeping up with modern tools and best practices to stay competitive.

interests.title: Open source
interests.description: Active interest in open projects to learn, collaborate, and share solutions.

timeline.description: Design and delivery of projects that demonstrate frontend, backend, and software architecture capabilities, with emphasis on quality and technical documentation.
Implementation of modern web solutions, API integrations, and task automation to improve processes and reduce operational effort.

timeline.position: Intensive practice in systems and development
timeline.description: Solid foundation in systems, networking, and software development applied through labs and guided projects.

Projects.title: Projects
Projects.description: A selection of work that reflects my technical approach: maintainable solutions focused on outcomes and delivery quality.

items.name: Multilingual professional portfolio
items.description: Personal website built with Next.js and modular architecture to present technical profile, experience, and projects.

items.name: Task management API
items.description: Backend service with authentication, access control, and REST endpoints for project tracking and status workflows.

items.name: Internal workflow automation
items.description: Set of scripts and pipelines to reduce manual work and improve operational efficiency across development workflows.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: I am open to software development opportunities, technical collaborations, and freelance projects. If you think my profile can add value to your team, I would be glad to talk.
